summary: Iteration 26 - Tested NEW Strategy Export to PDF feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. PDF export generates valid PDF files with correct headers and Kalmori branding.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf returns Content-Disposition: attachment with filename
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf PDF content starts with %PDF signature
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf works with minimal data (just strategy and data_summary)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf filename follows pattern Kalmori_Strategy_{label}_{date}.pdf
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf uses release_title when label is null
Frontend: Fan Analytics page (/fan-analytics) loads with all charts and AI section
Frontend: 'Generate AI Strategy' button generates strategy with loading state
Frontend: After generating strategy, 'Export PDF' button visible with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'
Frontend: Export PDF button text shows 'Export PDF'
Frontend: Saved strategies panel shows PDF export icons (data-testid='export-strategy-{id}')
Frontend: Compare button visible when 2+ strategies exist (regression)
Frontend: Delete buttons present on strategy cards (regression)
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export uses reportlab library to generate server-side PDFs
PDF includes Kalmori branding with purple (#7C4DFF) color scheme
PDF contains all strategy sections: Optimal Release Window, Platform Strategy, Geographic Targeting, Pre-Release Timeline, Promotion Tips
PDF filename is sanitized to remove special characters
Frontend downloads PDF via blob URL with correct MIME type
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested the NEW Strategy Export to PDF feature. Backend endpoint: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf accepts strategy data and returns binary PDF. Frontend: Export PDF button appears after generating strategy (data-testid='export-pdf-btn'), and PDF export icons appear on saved strategy cards (data-testid='export-strategy-{id}'). Uses reportlab library for PDF generation. PDF filename pattern: Kalmori_Strategy_{label}_{date}.pdf. All previous endpoints still work (regression verified).

mocked_apis.AI Release Strategy: NOT MOCKED - uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
mocked_apis.PDF Export: NOT MOCKED - uses real reportlab library

pdf_sections: Artist info line (name, genre, streams analyzed)
Optimal Release Window (Best Day, Best Time, reasoning)
ui_components: PDF export icon on saved strategy cards (data-testid='export-strategy-{id}')
